pageContext.name: Assassin's Creed: Orlog Dice Game
pageContext.description: Sideshow and PureArts present the official worldwide release of the Assassin's Creed: Orlog Dice Game from Ubisoft's Assassin's Creed® Valhalla!  Played extensively by the Norsemen and Anglo-Saxons in every city of the video game, Orlog is played by two players who use dice rolls and bonus effects to claim victory over their opponent.  Will you earn enough God Favors and receive their blessings to win? There's only one way to find out…
